name: feeflow
description: Automated fee reconciliation infrastructure for Nigerian educational institutions (Nomba Hackathon 2026)

scripts.dev: npm run build:core && concurrently -n frontend,backend -c blue,green "npm run dev -w apps/frontend" "npm run start:dev -w apps/backend"
scripts.dev:backend: npm run build:core && npm run start:dev -w apps/backend
scripts.build: npm run build:core && npm run build -w apps/frontend && npm run build -w apps/backend
